prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026年招生计划小幅扩招（64→65）、吉林省物理类考生略减、学校顶尖层次与王牌专业的持续吸引力，以及2026年明显负面声誉可能带来的报考谨慎情绪，在2025年基准5277名基础上适度后移；预测最低位次约5376名，区间4876–5876名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 2910 → 6444 → 3628 → 4129 → 5277, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2022, due to a significant increase in the number of science candidates in the province (78,695, up 15% from 2021), the ranking noticeably shifted backward to 6444. It rebounded to 3628 in 2023 but then shifted backward again, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1,650 places over the past three years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 5,277. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Jilin Province: 74 in 2021, 71 in 2022, 69 in 2023, 64 in 2024, and 64 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 65, a slight increase of 1 student compared to 2025, an expansion of about 1.6%, which has limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it is approximately 16th (Top 20), with stable rankings in the 11–16 range in recent years, making it a top national comprehensive university. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative' (51 events, 46 negative), mainly involving reports of academic misconduct and teacher ethics violations, abnormal admission score lines, etc. Its Douyin popularity ranks 35th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.31 million. In 2023, there was high attention due to abnormal admission scores (12 events), and in 2022, moderate attention (significant drop in admission score lines). The concentrated negative public opinion may make some candidates more cautious in their applications. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 19 disciplines rated A- or above: Stomatology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Nursing A+, Clinical Medicine A, Mathematics A, Chemistry A, Biology A, Pharmacy A, Software Engineering A, Light Industry Technology and Engineering A, Marxist Theory A, Chinese History A, Materials Science and Engineering A-, Chemical Engineering and Technology A-, Water Conservancy Engineering A-, Law A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, Archaeology A-, Computer Science and Technology A-. Its flagship majors such as Stomatology, Clinical Medicine, and Computer Science are extremely attractive.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, Clinical Medicine, and Stomatology continue to be highly popular/recommended in 2026; Journalism and Communication are clearly discouraged. The estimated number of physics category candidates in Jilin Province in 2026 is about 79,991, a slight decrease of about 0.5% from 80,421 in 2025, indicating a slight easing of competition. Sichuan University is located in Chengdu (Southwest China), while Jilin Province is in the Northeast, so there are certain regional preference differences for cross-province study. The university's enrollment proportion in Jilin Province is about 0.5%–1% (about 64 students in 2025 out of a total national enrollment of about 6,000–7,000), representing a medium-scale enrollment from other provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating and backward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (64→65), the slight decrease in physics category candidates in Jilin Province, the sustained attractiveness of the university's top-tier level and flagship majors, and the cautious application sentiment that may arise from the significantly negative reputation in 2026, a moderate backward shift is expected based on the 2025 baseline of 5,277. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5,376, with a range of 4,876–5,876.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Stomatology (5-year program)
- Computer Science (including dual bachelor's degree)
- Clinical Medicine (5-year program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information
- Electrical Engineering
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Manufacturing).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials Science (Advanced Materials and New Energy)
- Chemistry
- Engineering Experimental Class (Clean Energy and Smart Construction)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Green City and Smart Construction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 4,876–5,876, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<4,876), you can focus on applying for Tier 1 majors such as Stomatology and Computer Science. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>5,876), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors and strive for Tier 2.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 1086 → 630 → 1841 → 803 → 627, with significant fluctuations. In 2023, due to an increase in the number of liberal arts examinees in the province (33,302 people, an increase of 5.4% compared to 2022), there was a noticeable backward shift to 1841. In 2024–2025, it rebounded to within 800; the 2025 baseline is approximately 627, the best level in recent years. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Jilin Province: 4 people in 2021, 7 in 2022, 7 in 2023, 11 in 2024, and 10 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 10 people, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 16th (Top 20) in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the top-tier comprehensive universities in the country. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is "significantly negative," but mainly involves academic misconduct incidents in science, engineering, and medicine, with limited direct impact on liberal arts admissions. Douyin popularity ranking is 35th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.31 million. Among historical abnormal signals for file submission, 2022 (medium attention) and 2023 (high attention) mainly involved science admission lines, with less impact on liberal arts. Related advantageous disciplines in liberal arts: Chinese Language and Literature A+, Chinese History A, Law A-, Archaeology A-, Marxist Theory A. The Humanities Experimental Class (Chinese and Journalism Communication) corresponds to Chinese Language and Literature A+, with top-tier disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, Chinese Language/Chinese major is socially recommended, Law is divided and wait-and-see, Journalism Communication is clearly discouraged. The estimated number of history category examinees in Jilin Province in 2026 is about 30,877, a slight decrease of about 0.6% from 31,071 in 2025, with slightly eased competition. Sichuan University is located in Chengdu, while Jilin Province is in the Northeast region, with regional preferences for cross-province enrollment. The university's enrollment of liberal arts students in Jilin Province is relatively small (about 10 people), belonging to small-scale enrollment from other provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the large fluctuations in historical rankings but the recent upward trend, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the slight decrease in history category examinees in Jilin Province, and the sustained attractiveness of the university's top-tier level and advantageous liberal arts disciplines, it remains stable based on the 2025 baseline of 627. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 618, with a range of 547–689.
